summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently using the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive items were detected, and no close/merge/fix actions are allowed for this job. Two proof-gated contributor PRs should remain open; three PRs need maintainer judgment or are maintainer-owned.

actions.reason: Useful focused PR should remain open for the Feishu followup queue lane; this inventory job should not close or merge it.
Keep open as a related proof-gated bug-fix PR; technical validation is not complete.
The next decision is maintainer technical correctness review for an API/runtime compatibility change; no close or automated merge path is available in this job.
Maintainer-owned stacked test migration with failing checks requires maintainer handling; automation should not close, relabel as low-signal, or merge it.
This is the plausible replacement path for the legacy Codex migration issue, but its breadth and compatibility/auth/session-state surface require maintainer review outside this inventory job.
